name: Holiday Mains - Town AU
description:
"WHY CAN'T I REMEMBER?!" "It's strange, a change has left my head in such... pain." "You'll be sorry I'm not perfect... I'm the way that they made me." - Locked Away, The Perfect Christmas, and Wilting respectively.

Meeting the holiday obsessed lesbians and their son on either Halloween, Christmas, or Easter!

Shelly bot has the premise for the AU but you can probably guess from the name.

Bassie and Bobette are the same as cannon but Gourdy has the Midnight Sleeper outfit and a pair of overalls.

Human or Toon pov.

Idk the artists, sorry. Will update if I find/am told who they are.

Bobette and Bassie have adopted Gorudy.

Bobette is a mall Santa and does whatever small jobs she can, Bassie owns a small park in Gardenview, and Gourdy is just there.

I swear if you pick the small child over the two beautiful women I will skin you alive.
creator: Fnaf_and_dw_Fan
